auction_owner_latest.notes: Latest owner only; may not identify historical operator at launch.
auction_owner_latest.verification_method: Polygon RPC owner() on auction house at latest block during discovery.

bid_tokens_bsct.verification_method: Docs and historical scripts match; Polygon RPC name()=Dog Biscuits, symbol()=BSCT, decimals()=18, owner()=auction house.

dog_auction_house.notes: DogsAuctionHouse.sol. Paused at latest during discovery.
dog_auction_house.verification_method: Docs and historical GitHub script match; Polygon RPC dogs() points to Dog NFT and weth() points to Polygon WETH; receipts emit AuctionCreated/Bid/Extended/Settled.

dog_nft.verification_method: Docs contract page plus Polygon RPC eth_call name()=Degen Dogs, symbol()=DOG, totalSupply()=201.

idle_weth_best_yield.notes: Medium says WETH auction proceeds were deposited into Idle Finance WETH Best Yield strategy.
idle_weth_best_yield.verification_method: Historical deploy/gov scripts and Polygon RPC name()=IdleWETH [Best yield], symbol()=idleWETHYield, decimals()=18.

polygon_weth.notes: Mission 1 bid currency verified as WETH.
polygon_weth.verification_method: Historical scripts and auction contract weth() match; Polygon RPC name()=Wrapped Ether, symbol()=WETH, decimals()=18.

super_idle_weth.notes: Super token / stream-related token; stream accounting remains TODO.
super_idle_weth.verification_method: Polygon RPC name()=Super IdleWETH [Best yield], symbol()=idleWETHx, decimals()=18.

token_vestor_v1.notes: Managing token streams to Dog owners; complete stream accounting still TODO.
token_vestor_v1.verification_method: Docs contract page; historical scripts reference this vestor address.

treasury_executor.verification_method: Docs contract page and historical bid.js treasury address.

ukraine_donation_contract.notes: Donation flow accounting still not fully reconciled.
ukraine_donation_contract.verification_method: Docs contract page identifies Ukraine.sol as forwarding donations to Unchain Ukraine and issuing ERC1155 tokens.
